texto: Being depressed is one thing when your life can be seen by outsiders as justifiably hard, but it is a whole different shameful story when you have everything and still feel like you can't bear to get out of bed in the morning. People can't really be sympathetic to you when they can begin to fathom what you could be so upset about.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Boyd Varty: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Being depressed is one thing when your life can be seen by outsiders as justifiably hard, but it …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, depression, being pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de bom-dia e reflexao.
